---
title: "Gertrude Mary Ireland Blackburne"
---

## Gertrude Mary Ireland Blackburne

**Dates:** (13 May 1861-28 November 1951)

### Description

journalist and church worker

### Biography

Daughter of John Blackburne of Chester, wine merchant, and Mary Buchanan, she was co-editor of <i>The Churchwoman</i> (1897-1905) assistant editor of <i>The Sign</i> (1905-50) and contributor to <i>MP</i> (1889-1898).  It appears that her family may have originally used the spelling Blackburn. [WWW; wills index]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 4th  [1901]
- Letter from Feb 2d [1900]
- Letter from Aug 21 [1899]
- Letter from Sept 24th [1897 or later?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from [December 1885?]
- Letter from Feb 28th 1885
- Letter from [February 1885]
- Letter from [autumn 1885]
- Letter from [1885[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
